calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Deft'S Answer And For Leave To Seek Default Judgment;
Off Calendar May-09-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE
Robert Dresner, Esq., appeared for Plaintiff and moving party: Liquidation Property, Inc.
No other appearance

RULING:
TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Liquidation Property, Inc.'s Motion To Strike Defendant's Answer And For Leave To Seek Default Judgment is granted. No opposition has been filed. The court finds that Defendant has failed to oppose any of the discovery motions and has failed to comply with the court's previous orders. Based thereon, the court finds that additional orders to respond would not result in compliance. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
